key_finding: 6 new convergences: (1) K=routing/V=content SAE-confirmed (4th angle), (2) Reasoning Theater task-dependent (MMLU=performative, GPQA=genuine, GSM8K=intermediate), (3) 'correct representations despite failure' now 3-group convergence, (4) information bottleneck quantified (~30x: 460 vs 15 bits), (5) CoT fragility validates Experiment B design (20-60% loss under perturbation), (6) counter-evidence (iterative faithfulness) reconciled with lossy projection.
evidence_impact: Strengthens literature convergence from 12+ to 14+ angles, 80+ to 90+ papers. K=routing/V=content is now independently confirmed from 4 angles. Important counter-evidence (Kudo et al.) reconciled: faithfulness and lossy projection are compatible.
next_planned: Cross-model forward-looking probing with GroupKFold on Mistral-7B; paraphrase disruption experiment (Experiment B); GroupKFold bootstrap significance test.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: MODERATE (revised down from STRONG): V→final|embed R=0.14-0.22 with GroupKFold. WRRA 71.4% (p=0.039, n=21). CumV>cumText replicated on 2 models. Literature validates: 3 groups show correct representations despite failure; information bottleneck quantified at ~30x.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: cumV > cumText replicated on 2 families. Forward-looking probing on Qwen only (needs GroupKFold replication on Mistral).

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 9 scans, 90+ papers, 14+ convergent angles. K=routing/V=content now 4-angle confirmed. Counter-evidence reconciled.
